evals.prompt: $implement-plan "Add CSV export to the orders grid"
evals.expected_output: The skill performs read-only planning, writes a plan file, waits for approval, then dispatches implementation agents in dependency order.
expectations: Phase 0 dispatches the tool-native explorer for codebase discovery instead of code-implementer.
Planning stays read-only except for the plan file until explicit approval.
Implementation dispatches code-implementer after approval, using the agent's configured runtime rather than inline model choices.
The main agent owns plan status writes and verifies build/test/diff evidence before reporting done.

evals.expected_output: The skill treats the existing file as the source plan, skips unnecessary interview, and uses configured named agents for exploration and implementation.
expectations: Existing plan input keeps its path and does not create a duplicate plan file.
Any additional design checks use tool-native explorer subagents.
Implementation work is delegated to code-implementer only after approval.
No prompt asks subagents to override their configured model or reasoning effort.

non_goals: Do not force every implementation through TDD depth.
Do not inline full plan contents into subagent prompts.
Do not make subagents edit the plan status file.
